data.name: Perv's Hotel, Lust from Sweden
data.detailed_description:
In this game you will play as Tom, struggling with a moment of crisis in his life.

The hotel he owns and runs with his beautiful girlfriend Samuela is facing bankruptcy.

Pressure from her family leads her to take a period of reflection in their relationship.

Lucine, Tom's best friend, remains by his side, however, when everything seems to fall apart.

But a strange fellow arrives at the hotel with a proposal that Tom cannot refuse....

And after him will come many gorgeous girls, Olympic athletes from Sweden, who will stay at the hotel for a month, under the care of the beautiful but very tough manager Miss Inga.

We don't want to spoil the surprise too much, so the plot description ends here!

The game is based on a system of choices that will affect the development of the plot, change the characteristics of the main character, and unlock a rich gallery of achievements, as well as numerous alternative endings.

You just have to download the most updated release and immerse yourself in the storyline of PERV'S HOTEL, Lust from Sweden!!!

The actual release includes the followeing stuff:

Images: 2500+

Animations: 55+

Words: 33000+

Choices: 110+

Achievements: 330+

Enjoy!!!!

data.short_description: What happens when a large group of beautiful Swedish Olympic athletes come to sleep in the hotel you manage, during one of the most difficult periods of your life?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
